---
# This file is generated automatically by Jekyll at every build/publish.
# It follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) to expose the site
# content to AI models. Do not add a layout: it must be served as plain text.
layout: null
permalink: /llms.txt
sitemap: false
---
# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

{{ site.author.bio }} Based in {{ site.author.location }}.

This file lists the public content of {{ site.url }} so that AI models and agents
can discover and reference the technical sessions, talks, slides and videos
delivered by {{ site.author.name }}.

## Main pages

- [Home]({{ '/' | absolute_url }}): profile and overview.
- [Video Recap]({{ '/VideoRecap.html' | absolute_url }}): recorded talks and video highlights.

## Technical sessions by year
{% assign year_pages = site.pages | where_exp: "p", "p.url contains '/TechnicalSessions'" | sort: "url" | reverse %}
{% for p in year_pages -%}
- [{{ p.title | default: p.name }}]({{ p.url | absolute_url }})
{% endfor %}
## All technical sessions
{% capture newline %}
{% endcapture %}
{% assign sessions = site.pages | where_exp: "p", "p.url contains '/technicalsessions/'" | sort: "url" | reverse %}
{% for p in sessions -%}
{%- assign abstract = "" -%}
{%- assign after = p.content | split: "Abstract" -%}
{%- if after.size > 1 -%}
{%- assign abstract = after[1] | split: "<br" | first | strip_html | replace: newline, " " | replace: "  ", " " | replace: "  ", " " | strip -%}
{%- endif -%}
- [{{ p.title | default: p.name }}]({{ p.url | absolute_url }}){% if abstract != "" %}: {{ abstract }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
